title: Particular ✨ Reforged
description: Particular is a mod that enhances Minecraft's ambience with many hand-crafted visual effects.
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/orqktjl.png)

Particular is a mod that enhances Minecraft's ambience with many hand-crafted visual effects.

Support on [Discord](https://discord.gg/m4EHeRjfZ9) !

## Visual Effects * [3D water splashes](https://youtu.be/vdrn4ouZRvQ?t=27) * Matches the water color * The wider the entity the wider the splash * The taller the fall the taller the splash ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1219053/description_4678497c-2509-47c8-aa19-264ab655e858.png) * Waterfall cascades * Cascades appear when falling water is over 2 block deep source water and the top source water has at least 1 open side * Cascade strength is proportional to the falling water's height and the number of open sides to the source water ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1219053/description_37321349-afcb-445f-bf8b-97adc123e676.png) * Fireflies * Spawn in warm biomes at flowers and tall grass * Spawn rates are randomized at dusk ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1219053/description_79f6f459-600e-4f0d-83ad-6d8dbbffff54.png) * Falling leaves * Each leaves block has a unique leaf particle with varying behavior * Creates ripples when landing on water ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1219053/description_a900b786-5bcc-46fe-8183-f8776d5da629.png) * Cave dust * Spawn rates are proportional to depth and sunlight level ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1219053/description_1a888eaa-9012-4c41-8528-330f073c9cdd.png) * Bubbles from underwater chests and barrels * When a chest or barrel is opened underwater it releases bubbles * Ender chests release green-tinted bubbles * Place soul sand under a chest to make it automatically open and release bubbles ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1219053/description_13325853-dcbc-4489-941b-faca3092a063.png) * Popping bubbles * Ripples from rain and water drips * Cake eating particles * Emissive lava drips ## Configuration The mod can be configured to disable any of the effects and adjust which biomes should not spawn cave dust. ## Supported Mods * [Traverse](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/traverse) * Custom falling leaves * [Regions Unexplored](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored) * Custom falling leaves * [Wilder Wild](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/wilder-wild) * Custom falling leaves ## Supported Languages * Canadian English (Voxxin) * Canadian French (Voxxin) * Chinese Simplified (KlainsX) * European French (Voxxin) * Mexican Spanish (cerealconjugo) * Russian (Alexander317) ## Disclaimers Port of the [Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/particular) version. [Effective](https://modrinth.com/mod/effective) is a similar but unrelated mod that's available for older versions and Built for Quilt™, so send them some love!   If you'd like to support me and the development of my mods, I recommend trying out BisectHosting. Use code "project8gbderam" to get 25% off your first month of a gaming server for new customers.
